allow: Bash(git commit --amend -m 'fix\(packaging\): track Helm chart + cmd entrypoints \(gitignore was eating them\)' -m 'The bare .gitignore patterns '\\''kubeguard'\\'' / '\\''kubectl-kubeguard'\\'' \(meant for the built binaries\) are slashless, so git matched them against any path component — silently un-tracking the charts/kubeguard/ chart AND the cmd/kubeguard/ and cmd/kubectl-kubeguard/ entrypoints. A fresh clone was missing both binary main packages and the entire Helm chart.' -m '- Anchor the binary ignores to repo root \(/kubeguard, /kubectl-kubeguard, +.exe\) so they no longer swallow same-named directories. *)
